zh.lifeSummary: 當Peter Jane於1566年9月4日出生時，他的父親Willyam W Jane17歲，母親Mary21歲。他於大約1599年與Elizabeth Abcomb在英國英格蘭可瓦爾聖 辛特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1640年12月27日在英國可瓦爾享年74歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭可瓦爾聖 辛特。

nameMeanings.name: Jane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Jaime, Orlando, Alicia, Isidro, Julio, Miguel, Rafael.
English (Devon and Cornwall): variant of Jayne . As a personal name, Jane was not specialized as a female form until the 17th century.

variants.name: Janes
meanings: English (southern): variant of Jane , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s (see Jayne ).

Slovenian and Croatian (of Slovenian origin) (Janeš): variant of Slovenian Janež, from an old equivalent of the Latin personal name Johannes (see John ), or a topographic name or metonymic occupational name from janež ‘anise’. Compare Yanes .
Czech (Janeš, Jáneš): from a pet form of the personal name Jan .

variants.name: Jayne
meanings: English (Gloucestershire) and Welsh (Monmouthshire): from the Middle English male personal name Jan(e), from Old French Jehan, a variant of Johan, which gave rise to the common alternative John . Sometimes the name may also arise from the Welsh variant Ieun of Welsh Ieuan, likewise equivalent to John (compare Evan ).

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Peter Jane was born on 4 September 1566, his father, Willyam W Jane, was 17 and his mother, Mary, was 21. He married Elizabeth Abcomb about 1599, in St Neot, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 27 December 1640, in Cornwall, England, at the age of 74, and was buried in St Neot, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Peter Jane est né le 4 septembre 1566, son père, Willyam W Jane, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Mary, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Abcomb environ 1599, à St Neot, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 27 décembre 1640, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterré à St Neot, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Peter Jane am 4. September 1566 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Willyam W Jane 17 und seine Mutter Mary 21. Er hat um 1599 in St Neot, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Abcomb geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 27. Dezember 1640 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Cornwall, England und wurde in St Neot, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Peter Jane è nato il il 4 settembre 1566, il suo padre, Willyam W Jane, aveva 17 anni e il suo madre, Mary, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Abcomb circa 1599, nel St Neot, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 27 dicembre 1640, nel Cornwall, England, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolto a St Neot, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Peter Janeが1566年9月4日に生まれた時，父Willyam W Janeは17歳，母Maryは21歳であった。約1599年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルスト ネオトでElizabeth Abcombと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1640年12月27日にイギリスコルンワルで74歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスコルンワルスト ネオトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Peter Jane(이)가 1566년 9월 4일에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Willyam W Jane(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1599년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 스트 니오트에서 Elizabeth Abcomb(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1640년 12월 27일 영국 코른월에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 스트 니오트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Peter Jane nasceu em 4 de setembro de 1566, seu pai, Willyam W Jane, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Mary, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Abcomb aproximadamente 1599, em St Neot, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 27 de dezembro de 1640, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, com 74 anos, e foi sepultado em St Neot, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Peter Jane родился 4 сентября 1566 г., его отцу по имени Willyam W Jane было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Abcomb около 1599 г. в местности ст неот, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 27 декабря 1640 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия в возрасте 74 лет и был похоронен в местности ст неот, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Peter Jane nació el 4 de septiembre de 1566, su papá, Willyam W Jane, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Mary, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Abcomb aproximadamente 1599, en St Neot, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 27 de diciembre de 1640, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultado en St Neot, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
